The '''''Corsair''-class cruiser''' was an 18-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] heavy assault [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] built by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]]. It was armed with two [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries and a pair of [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]]. It was used by the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]], [[Dharus’ Buccaneers]], as well as by the pirate [[Rei'Kas]].

==History==
Five of these starfighters were used by the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]] to [[Raid at Iphigin|attack]] [[Iphigin]] just before the [[Caamas Document]] crisis struck the New Republic, proving to be rather well-defended in terms of shield and armor.<ref name="SotP">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>

Seven ''Corsairs'' would attempt to ambush the ''[[Wild Karrde]]'' at [[Kathol (planet)|Kathol]], before being driven off by the modified freighter. Eighteen would later be destroyed at [[Exocron]].<ref name="VotF" />

==Behind the scenes==
The only statistics available for the ''Corsair''-class cruiser come from ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' in reference to the ''[[Red Lancer]]'' and the ''[[Blue Queen]]'', which are both identified as heavily modified. The stats on this page are thus those of modified ''Corsairs''.<ref name="GG9 FftR" />
